name: generate_github_actions_workflow
description: Generate a GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow YAML file for the specified application. Supports build, test, deploy, and complete pipelines with optional Kubernetes deployment stages and matrix builds.

kubernetes.description: Include a Kubernetes deployment stage in the workflow.

branches.description: Comma-separated list of branches that trigger the workflow.

matrix.description: Enable matrix builds across multiple platforms/OS.

name: generate_jenkins_pipeline
description: Generate a Jenkins Declarative Pipeline (Jenkinsfile) for the specified application. Supports build, test, deploy, complete, and parameterized pipeline types.

pipeline_type.description: Type of Jenkins pipeline to generate.

parameters.description: Add runtime build parameters to the pipeline.

name: generate_k8s_config
description: Generate Kubernetes Deployment and Service manifests for an application. Optionally generates method-specific resources (e.g. a Kustomization for kustomize-based deployments).

app_name.description: Name of the Kubernetes application (used as resource name and label).

deployment_method.description: Deployment tooling (adds method-specific manifests; kustomize adds a Kustomization resource).

expose_service.description: Create a ClusterIP Service alongside the Deployment.

name: scaffold_devcontainer
description: Generate a devcontainer.json and devcontainer.env.json configuration for the DevOps-OS development container based on selected languages and tools.

languages.description: Comma-separated list of languages to install (python, java, javascript, go, rust, csharp, php).

cicd_tools.description: Comma-separated list of CI/CD tools (docker, terraform, kubectl, helm, github_actions, jenkins).

kubernetes_tools.description: Comma-separated list of Kubernetes tools (k9s, kustomize, argocd_cli, kubeseal, flux, kind, minikube).
